title: AI-Driven Demand Forecasting for Perishable Goods
description: Develop a machine learning model to predict demand for short-shelf-life products across Nestle's European distribution network.

title: Circular Packaging Design Assessment Framework
description: Create a quantitative framework for evaluating the environmental impact of alternative packaging materials across Nestle's product lines.

title: Biomarker Discovery Using Multi-Omics Data Integration
description: Apply computational biology methods to integrate transcriptomic, proteomic, and metabolomic datasets for identifying novel biomarkers in oncology.

title: Wearable-Based Patient Monitoring for Clinical Trials
description: Design and evaluate a digital health pipeline that ingests data from consumer wearables to generate clinically meaningful endpoints for decentralized clinical trials.

title: Digital Twin for Collaborative Robot Work Cells
description: Build a simulation-based digital twin of a collaborative robot work cell using ABB's RobotStudio platform.

title: Federated Learning for Telecom Network Optimization
description: Investigate how federated learning can be applied to optimize Swisscom's mobile network without centralizing sensitive user data.

title: Predictive Maintenance for Rolling Stock Using IoT Data
description: Design a predictive maintenance model for SBB train bogies using sensor telemetry from onboard IoT systems.

title: Climate Risk Modeling with Alternative Data Sources
description: Explore how satellite imagery, social media signals, and IoT sensor networks can augment traditional actuarial models for climate-related catastrophe risk at Swiss Re.

title: Generative Models for Molecular Lead Optimization
description: Apply generative AI techniques to optimize lead compounds in Novartis's oncology pipeline.

title: Recommendation Engine for Omnichannel Grocery Retail
description: Design and prototype a product recommendation engine that works seamlessly across Migros's online shop, mobile app, and in-store digital touchpoints.

title: Privacy-Preserving Analytics for Health Data Sharing
description: Design and implement a differential privacy framework that enables secure sharing of patient health records for research purposes.
